code:
import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(input)
  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut buf = ""
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(input, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
    if is_ws
      if string.len(buf) > 0
        match string.parse_int(buf)
        when Some(v)
          if not list.contains(nums, v)
            nums = list.push(nums, v)
          end
        when None
          ()
        end
        buf = ""
      end
    else
      buf = "#{buf}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if string.len(buf) > 0
    match string.parse_int(buf)
    when Some(v)
      if not list.contains(nums, v)
        nums = list.push(nums, v)
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
  end

  let total = list.len(nums)
  mut sorted: List<Int> = []
  mut used: List<Int> = []
  mut k = 0
  while k < total
    mut best_idx = -1
    mut best_val = 0
    mut j = 0
    while j < total
      if not list.contains(used, j)
        let v = match list.get(nums, j)
        when Some(x)
          x
        when None
          0
        end
        if best_idx == -1
          best_idx = j
          best_val = v
        else
          if v < best_val
            best_idx = j
            best_val = v
          end
        end
      end
      j = j + 1
    end
    sorted = list.push(sorted, best_val)
    used = list.push(used, best_idx)
    k = k + 1
  end

  mut output = ""
  mut m = 0
  while m < total
    let v = match list.get(sorted, m)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if m == 0
      output = "#{v}"
    else
      output = "#{output} #{v}"
    end
    m = m + 1
  end
  println(output)
end
